name: Odd Even Linked List
description: Given the head of a singly linked list, group all odd-indexed nodes together followed by all even-indexed nodes. The first node is odd, the second is even, and so on. Do it in O(1) extra space and O(n) time.
constraints: The number of nodes is in [0, 10^4]. -10^6 <= Node.val <= 10^6.

performance.stress_intent: exercise long lists that punish repeated partition rescans instead of a single pass that relinks odd and even position chains
